title: Support for "don't care" bit in comb processes

features.name: dont_care_bits_in_comb_assignment
features.description: Code should include a combinational always @(*) block with an assignment containing don't-care bits ('x') in the literal value

features.name: case_alternative_with_dont_care_bits
features.description: Code should include a case statement where one alternative uses don't-care bits ('x') in the literal value

features.name: default_dont_care_override_in_case
features.description: Code should include a case statement that overrides a default assignment containing don't-care bits within a combinational process
features.snippet: always @(*) begin o = 4'b0xxx; case (i[3:2]) 2'b00: o = 4'b10xx; endcase end
